purpose: Runtime evidence that the image-bundled TorchTitan path can be patched so the 4x FSDP and EP meshes use distinct ProcessGroup objects.

temporary_patch.mechanism: Add backend_override="nccl" when flattening the EP DeviceMesh so DeviceMesh creates a distinct EP ProcessGroup even when the FSDP and EP rank sets are equal.

interpretation.what_is_proven: For the 4x FSDP4/EP4 image-backed TorchTitan path, a tiny EP DeviceMesh backend override is sufficient to make FSDP and EP ProcessGroup objects distinct while preserving the same rank set and passing basic collectives.
what_is_not_proven: actual RCCL stream overlap or reduced communication exposure
the newer local WIP TorchTitan source on this same image, because that path still hits the DeviceMesh backend_override="fake" compatibility issue
the final direct TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 canary, because torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4 is not materialized yet
interpretation.execution_policy_read: This patched probe is useful evidence for the communication-domain fix, but the real DSv4 canary should run direct TorchTitan with torchrun and a real DeepSeek-V4 config rather than the Primus wrapper.

validation_commands.command: GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2,3,4,5 CANARY_DEDICATED_EP_PG=true bash experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_dsv4_style_8xmi350_canary.sh pg-probe
